issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: NativeWind setup in fresh Expo project
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the exact npx expo install command, nativewind/preset, global.css, and layout import; baseline often gives outdated v2 babel-based setup.

scenarios.name: Dark mode toggle following system
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses useColorScheme from nativewind with toggleColorScheme; baseline typically pulls from react-native or builds a manual ThemeContext.
